articles.title: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire Says Crypto Use Cases Still Remain Strong Following FTX Debacle

articles.title: U.S. House Financial Services Committee Plans Official Hearing on FTX Collapse: Report
articles.description: The U.S. House Financial Services Committee is reportedly planning on holding an official hearing regarding the recent collapse of the crypto exchange platform FTX. articles.title: U.S. Regulators May Face Scrutiny Over FTX Links
articles.description: FTX's ties to political and regulatory figuresespecially those who have received donations from its principal executiveshave raised suspicions. Several former U.S. regulators, including commissioners of the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC), later took roles within FTX, leading to suspicion of impropriety.While the hiring of formed CFTC personnel is legal, the appointments have...

articles.title: Pro-XRP Attorney Launches Petition To Investigate SEC Chair Gary Gensler’s Connections With Sam Bankman-Fried
articles.description: Attorney and XRP supporter John Deaton is launching a public campaign aimed at convincing lawmakers to probe Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) chair Gary Gensler and his ties to Sam Bankman-Fried’s FTX. Deaton’s petition on Change.org has garnered more than 3,000 signatures at time of writing, and a message portal on his website, CryptoLaw, has […]

articles.title: JPMorgan Chase, Wells Fargo among potentially exposed FTX parties
articles.description: Potentially impacted parties are listed in an FTX filing in the defunct crypto exchange's ongoing Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection filings.

articles.title: New FTX CEO Says the Collapsed Exchange’s Top Leaders Were ‘Potentially Compromised Individuals’
articles.description: The new chief executive of bankrupt crypto exchange FTX says that the platform’s leadership was made up of “potentially compromised individuals.” According to recent bankruptcy filings, FTX CEO John Ray, who took the firm’s help from founder Sam Bankman-Fried last week, says that the crypto exchange’s current situation is unprecedented. “Never in my career have […]

articles.title: FTX Fraud: More Bombshell Revelations in New Bankruptcy Filing
articles.description: Lies, embezzlement, incompetence, and several instances of fraud are some of the subjects discussed in the new filing. Things are going from bad to worse for former FTX CEO Sam Bankman-Fried and his accomplices.A Thursday bankruptcy filing from new FTX CEO John J. Ray III has shed new light on the nefarious activities taking place at the now-bankrupt crypto exchange under its previous CEO, Sam...

articles.title: FTX bankruptcy court filing reveals Alameda gave $1.6B in loans to SBF, others
articles.description: A November 17 court filing from new FTX CEO officer John Ray III revealed that the former CEO of the bankrupt crypto exchange Sam Bankman-Fried got $1 billion in personal loans from Alameda Research.

articles.title: Ripple CEO Says Current Crisis Will Make Crypto Stronger, Announces Huge Updates
articles.description: While FTX’s sudden collapse continues to fuel uncertainty among the world’s crypto investors, some industry representatives believe that the cryptosphere could emerge stronger from the turmoil. This is according to Brad Garlinghouse, the CEO of US blockchain company Ripple Labs, who has also announced major updates.... Read More: Ripple CEO Says Current Crisis Will Make Crypto Stronger,...

articles.title: Nexo had offered BlockFi an $850 million deal to potentially acquire it
articles.description: Nexo had offered rival BlockFi an $850 million deal in July when the latter firm was struggling financially and had signed a non-final deal with FTX, according to a proposal document obtained by The Block.

articles.title: Bitcoin price target now $13.5K as BTC trader says ‘exit all the markets’

articles.title: Binance Halts Deposits of Solana-based USDT and USDC

articles.title: Uniswap website goes dark for some users after Cloudflare routing problem
articles.description: The Uniswap website is only pulling up a blank page when loaded, with the team blaming a routing problem with internet infrastructure provider Cloudflare.
